column1: 彼はギターが弾ける。又、ピアノも上手だ。
column2: かれはぎたーがひける。また、ぴあのもじょうずだ。
column3: He can play guitar. Furthermore, he's also good at piano.
column4: 又 / も (also / furthermore — contrast pair)
column5: 又 + Clause (furthermore, at discourse level) / Noun + も + Predicate (also, inclusive particle)
column6: 又 = discourse-level addition of another point; も = inclusive particle marking an additional item within a clause
column8: 又 = adds a new clause/point at discourse level; も replaces が/を/は to include another item; 又は = or (alternative, not addition)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:又-も source:authored scaffold:pending-audio source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
